_note: Example profile — a different persona to prove the pipeline tailors to each person. Safe to delete or replace with a real friend's profile.

watch_topics: interest rates and their effect on startup funding

company_watchlist._note: Innovation announcements, breakthroughs, new products only — never earnings/stock/exec news.

startup_radar._note: New businesses, launches, funding, novel models. Test: 'huh, that's a clever business'.
spaces: any genuinely novel business model worth knowing about

deprioritize: political commentary not tied to a concrete policy change

source_preferences._note: 'News before it's news' is additive, not exclusive — big mainstream stories that matter still belong.
also_scan_early_sources: primary research: papers, preprints, university/lab press releases
YouTube talks/interviews with researchers, founders, operators
prediction markets and other early quantitative signals
avoid: re-briefing a mainstream story running unchanged for days
stories whose only novelty is that another outlet repeated them

prediction_markets._note: When a briefed story has a live market, show its probability as a chip. Label as 'crowd forecast', never fact. If a figure can't be sourced with a date, skip it.
topics: Bank of England / Fed rate decisions
UK politics and policy with market impact

podcasts._note: Summarise new episodes only, with an underlying idea, a relevance line, and a listen/skim verdict.

alert_topics: major UK transport or weather disruption
major security breaches affecting SaaS tools
